summary: Frontend refactoring verification for CalendarPage, IncomePage, ErrorBoundary, and VacancyPage hook fix complete. All decomposed components are working correctly. Navigation between all pages works without crashes.
passed_tests: CalendarPage: Page loads with title 'Occupancy Timeline'
CalendarPage: Property selector (All Properties dropdown) visible
CalendarPage: Navigation buttons (scroll left/right, Today) working
CalendarPage: Legend shows Long-term, Airbnb/VRBO, Vacant, Lead Interest, Today
CalendarPage: TimelineHeader component renders month headers (Feb-Sep 2026)
CalendarPage: PropertyGroup components render property headers with unit counts
CalendarPage: UnitRow components render unit rows (3 units with 11 booking bars)
CalendarPage: BookingBar components show tenant bookings with colors
CalendarPage: TodayMarker shows red vertical line at current date
CalendarPage: Scroll buttons navigate timeline correctly
IncomePage: Page loads with title 'Income'
IncomePage: Year selector shows 2026 with prev/next buttons
IncomePage: IncomeKPICards component shows 3 KPI cards (Current Month, Yearly Total, Monthly Average)
IncomePage: KPI values display correctly ($8,954.39 current month, $43,061.57 yearly, $8,443 average)
IncomePage: 12 IncomeMonthRow components render (Jan-Dec)
IncomePage: Month rows are collapsible - expand to show property breakdown
IncomePage: Year navigation changes year and loads new data (2025 shows $0)
IncomePage: Current month (Mar 2026) highlighted with 'Current' badge
VacancyPage: Page loads with title 'Vacancy' and year 2026
VacancyPage: 3 tabs visible (By Building, By Unit Size, Upcoming Vacancies)
VacancyPage: Vacancy data displays correctly with color-coded percentages
VacancyPage: useCallback hook fix working - no hook-related console errors
ErrorBoundary: Wraps all routes in App.js
ErrorBoundary: No error-boundary-fallback displayed during navigation
Navigation: Properties page loads
Navigation: Tenants page loads
Navigation: Calendar page loads
Navigation: Vacancy page loads
Navigation: Income page loads
Navigation: Deposits page loads (3 tabs, $5,000 total deposits)
Navigation: Parking page loads (2 tabs, shows decal #TEST_D001)
Navigation: Notifications page loads (Kanban with 5 columns, 8 total items)

calendar: BookingBar.js - Tenant booking bars with tooltips
UnitRow.js - Unit rows with bookings and leads
PropertyGroup.js - Property grouping with unit list
income: IncomeMonthRow.js - Collapsible month row with nested breakdown

critical_code_review_comments: Console warning about 'Invalid prop data-state on React.Fragment' appears in VacancyPage - likely from Radix UI Collapsible component. Low priority, doesn't affect functionality.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - all decomposed components and features verified working

context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend decomposition of CalendarPage and IncomePage was verified along with ErrorBoundary addition. CalendarPage now uses 7 extracted components (TimelineHeader, BookingBar, LeadOverlay, UnitRow, PropertyGroup, TodayMarker, calendarConstants). IncomePage uses 2 extracted components (IncomeKPICards, IncomeMonthRow). All pages navigate correctly without crashing. React.Fragment warning from Radix UI Collapsible is cosmetic only.
rca_of_issue: N/A - No issues found. Refactoring was successful.
